Setlist
Live Trax Series Credits Grid
These credits are listed as they are in the cases, which is why you see some names switch back and forth from formal to casual.

Not all volumes have credits for each role, and we've combined a few values when they aren't listed the same. We're sure there's a technical difference in why they are listed differently.


Some credits are the same or slightly different in each release are:
Management - Coran Capshaw
A & R - Bruce Flohr
Project Management - Patrick Jordan (vol. 1 to vol. 25), Patrick Jordan & Lindsay Brown (vol. 26 to vol. 47), Lindsay Brown (vol. 48 to current)
Monitor Engineer - Ian Kuhn (most volumes where credited), Jeff "Bagby" Thomas (vol. 48), Pat Rowe (post-2024 shows)
Archivist - Tucker Rogers
Link Release Show Date(s) Venue & Location Mix Live Sound & Monitor Recording Engineer (+ Live) Digital Editing Mastering Photos
